content:
TIL about https://github.com/pgsty/minio
There's a very interesting blog article about it as well: https://blog.vonng.com/en/db/minio-resurrect/ It's a nice peace on open source and community and very much reminds me of our own story - it's not just the code. It's the people keeping the supply chain running, fixing things and evolving the code base further.
(I'd still say it might be better to not rely on a single small business to run anything like this. Looking at https://rustfs.com/ might be a better fit for long term archival solutions)
On a related note, we've removed MinIO from our code base: #dev > discouraging MinIO #12036
